thi7:1.0.175: p_19Th2_239"Musalāni gahetvāna,dhaññaṁ koṭṭenti māṇavā;Puttadārāni posentā,dhanaṁ vindanti māṇavā.
thi7:1.0.176: p_19Th2_240Ghaṭetha buddhasāsane,yaṁ katvā nānutappati;Khippaṁ pādāni dhovitvā,ekamantaṁ nisīdatha.
thi7:1.0.177: p_19Th2_241Cittaṁ upaṭṭhapetvāna,ekaggaṁ susamāhitaṁ;Paccavekkhatha saṅkhāre,parato no ca attato".
thi7:1.0.179: p_19Th2_243Rattiyā purime yāme,pubbajātimanussariṁ;Rattiyā majjhime yāme,dibbacakkhuṁ visodhayiṁ.
thi7:1.0.180: p_19Th2_244Rattiyā pacchime yāme,tamokhandhaṁ padālayiṁ;Tevijjā atha vuṭṭhāsiṁ,katā te anusāsanī.
thi7:1.0.181: p_19Th2_245Sakkaṁva devā tidasā,saṅgāme aparājitaṁ;Purakkhatvā vihassāmi,tevijjāmhi anāsavā".
thi7:1.0.182: p_19Th2_247"Satiṁ upaṭṭhapetvāna,bhikkhunī bhāvitindriyā;Paṭivijjhi padaṁ santaṁ,saṅkhārūpasamaṁ sukhaṁ".
thi7:1.0.183: p_19Th2_248"Kaṁ nu uddissa muṇḍāsi,samaṇī viya dissasi;Na ca rocesi pāsaṇḍe,kimidaṁ carasi momuhā".
thi7:1.0.184: p_19Th2_249"Ito bahiddhā pāsaṇḍā,diṭṭhiyo upanissitā;Na te dhammaṁ vijānanti,na te dhammassa kovidā.
thi7:1.0.185: p_19Th2_250Atthi sakyakule jāto,buddho appaṭipuggalo;So me dhammamadesesi,diṭṭhīnaṁ samatikkamaṁ.
thi7:1.0.186: p_19Th2_251Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamuppādaṁ,Dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,Dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
thi7:1.0.187: p_19Th2_252Tassāhaṁ vacanaṁ sutvā,vihariṁ sāsane ratā;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ.
thi7:1.0.188: p_19Th2_253Sabbattha vihatā nandī,tamokhandho padālito;Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,nihato tvamasi antaka".
thi7:1.0.190: p_19Th2_256"Kiṁ nu jātiṁ na rocesi,jāto kāmāni bhuñjati;Bhuñjāhi kāmaratiyo,māhu pacchānutāpinī".
thi7:1.0.191: p_19Th2_257"Jātassa maraṇaṁ hoti,hatthapādāna chedanaṁ;Vadhabandhapariklesaṁ,jāto dukkhaṁ nigacchati.
thi7:1.0.192: p_19Th2_258Atthi sakyakule jāto,sambuddho aparājito;So me dhammamadesesi,jātiyā samatikkamaṁ.
thi7:1.0.193: p_19Th2_259Dukkhaṁ dukkhasamuppādaṁ,dukkhassa ca atikkamaṁ;Ariyaṁ caṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ,dukkhūpasamagāminaṁ.
thi7:1.0.194: p_19Th2_260Tassāhaṁ vacanaṁ sutvā,vihariṁ sāsane ratā;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ.
thi7:1.0.195: p_19Th2_261Sabbattha vihatā nandī,tamokhandho padālito;Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,nihato tvamasi antaka".
